query:
-- 更新負數工時記錄
UPDATE assignments 
SET scheduledHours = TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, scheduledStart, scheduledEnd),
    actualHours = CASE 
      WHEN actualStart IS NOT NULL AND actualEnd IS NOT NULL 
      THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, actualStart, actualEnd)
      ELSE actualHours
    END,
    varianceHours = CASE 
      WHEN actualStart IS NOT NULL AND actualEnd IS NOT NULL 
      THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, actualStart, actualEnd) - TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, scheduledStart, scheduledEnd)
      ELSE varianceHours
    END
WHERE workerId = 330087 AND scheduledHours < 0;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2iEKifVQ9gKtEas.9cbf5414b428 --database CMgr35KntT8tLtgpfJPejw --execute -- 更新負數工時記錄

    actualHours = CASE 
      WHEN actualStart IS NOT NULL AND actualEnd IS NOT NULL 
      THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, actualStart, actualEnd)
      ELSE actualHours
    END,
    varianceHours = CASE 
      WHEN actualStart IS NOT NULL AND actualEnd IS NOT NULL 
      THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, actualStart, actualEnd) - TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, scheduledStart, scheduledEnd)
      ELSE varianceHours
    END
WHERE workerId = 330087 AND scheduledHours < 0;
